description: Modern and responsive website optimized for all devices (mobile, tablet, desktop)
Multilingual version (FR/EN/DE) with Next.js 15 to reach an international audience
EventFrog and WhatsApp integration to facilitate online bookings
SEO-optimized with Schema.org for better local visibility
Intuitive expandable card interface with smooth animations for user experience
Revolutionary enterprise memory system powered by AI and temporal knowledge graphs
Intuitive conversational interface to query your documents in natural language
Smart multi-format processing: PDF (native and scanned via OCR), emails, photos, and structured data
Automatic AI-powered entity and relationship extraction for contextual and accurate answers
GraphRAG architecture (Python/FastAPI + Neo4j + OpenAI) with modern React frontend
Professional website for a recognized 20-year-old association in Southern France
Modern Next.js architecture with ultra-fast page and image loading
Secure contact form and interactive multi-location map integration
SEO-optimized with Google Analytics to measure online impact
Intuitive responsive navigation with photo carousel and interactive accordions
Bilingual landing page (English/Thai) for a camera rental business in Pattaya, Thailand
Mobile-first design with soft pink branding, smooth animations and portrait photo carousel
Instant language switching with fully translated UI and SEO metadata
Direct booking integration via LINE, Instagram and TikTok social channels
Built with Next.js 16, TypeScript and Tailwind CSS — deployed on Vercel with blazing-fast performance

projects.titre: Sawadi Asia – AI-powered multilingual news platform
description: International media monitoring platform with automatic translation in 12 languages
Fullstack React/TypeScript + Supabase architecture for real-time performance
Instant AI translation to publish your content without language barriers
Intuitive admin interface to manage multilingual content and translations
Side-by-side original/translated comparison with instant language switching
